title: Widget Reference: Static Server Pages
text: Widget Reference: Static Server Pages Uniface provides a set of HTML controls for use in static server pages (USPs). Compared to the widgets available for forms and dynamic server pages, HTML controls are fewer in number and have a more limited set of properties. They do not support logical widgets. Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Widgets for Static Server Pages Widgets for static server pages (USPs) are HTML controls that determine how data is represented in the web page.
